subject: King Piccolo seated on a skeletal throne, green Namekian demon-clan ruler in dark regalia
description: A green-skinned humanoid figure sits on an elaborate throne constructed from bone or skeletal elements — the throne back features what appears to be a large skull motif. The figure wears dark layered robes and armor or structured garments. His skin is clearly green. His expression is imperious and cold. Dark purple-black energy swirls around the throne and figure, reinforcing his malevolent authority. Two flanking skeletal or mechanical elements flank the throne sides. The overall composition is a wide seated-portrait establishing a throne-room scene. The card type line visible in the frame reads Namekian.
foreground: Green-skinned figure in dark robes seated on skull-motif skeletal throne
background: Dark purple swirling energy and void
